subject: Contract review needed by tomorrow
snippet: Could you review the attached contract before tomorrow afternoon?
body: Hi, could you review the attached contract before tomorrow afternoon? We need your comments before the client call at 4 PM.
notes: Direct coworker asks for a time-sensitive review.

subject: [MailGuard] CI failed on main
snippet: The latest workflow run failed on main.
body: The latest workflow run for MailGuard failed on main. Please review the failing test logs.

subject: Action required: verify your account information
snippet: Please verify your account information to avoid payout delays.
body: Please verify your account information by May 12 to avoid payout delays.
notes: Finance provider asks for verification before payout delay.

subject: This week in product design
snippet: A roundup of design links, inspiration, and case studies.
body: You are receiving this newsletter because you subscribed. Unsubscribe at any time.

subject: 48-hour flash sale: up to 70% off
snippet: Limited time coupons and deals selected for you.
body: Flash sale starts now. Use coupon SAVE70. Unsubscribe from promotions here.

subject: Interview follow-up and next steps
snippet: Thanks again for speaking with us. We'd like to schedule the next round.
body: Thanks again for speaking with us. We'd like to schedule the next round this week. Are you available Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon?

subject: Security alert: new sign-in detected
snippet: A new sign-in was detected from a Windows device.
body: A new sign-in was detected from a Windows device. If this was not you, reset your password immediately.
notes: Security alert should always be surfaced.

subject: Meeting changed: Project sync
snippet: The project sync meeting has moved from 2 PM to 3 PM.
body: The project sync meeting has moved from 2 PM to 3 PM. Location remains the same.
notes: Calendar notification should be treated as meeting update.

subject: You have 12 new notifications
snippet: See what you missed this week.
body: You have 12 new notifications and friend suggestions. Unsubscribe from these updates.
notes: Social digest notification should be ignored.

subject: Can you confirm the invoice today?
snippet: The finance team needs invoice confirmation today.
body: Can you confirm the invoice today? The finance team needs confirmation before they can process payment.
notes: Client finance request with same-day urgency.

subject: New dashboard features are here
snippet: Explore the latest product updates.
body: Explore the latest product updates and release notes. You can unsubscribe from product emails.

subject: Please review the incident summary
snippet: Could you review the incident summary before I send it out?
body: Could you review the incident summary before I send it out? I want to make sure the timeline is accurate.

subject: Password reset requested for your account
snippet: We received a password reset request. If this was not you, secure your account.
body: We received a password reset request for your account. If this was not you, secure your account and review recent sign-in activity.

subject: Payment failed for your subscription
snippet: Please update billing before service is interrupted.
body: Your latest payment failed. Please update billing before May 11 to avoid service interruption.

subject: Meeting canceled: Design critique
snippet: The design critique meeting has been canceled.
body: The design critique meeting scheduled for tomorrow has been canceled. No further action is required.
notes: Calendar cancellation is still useful to surface.

subject: Recruiter viewed your profile
snippet: A recruiter from FutureAI viewed your profile.
body: A recruiter from FutureAI viewed your profile. See who else viewed you this week. You can unsubscribe from these notifications.
notes: Mentions recruiter but is only a social notification.

subject: Next round interview availability
snippet: Could you share availability for a system design interview next week?
body: Could you share availability for a system design interview next week? We would like to schedule the next round with the AI platform team.

subject: Invoice attached for April services
snippet: The April invoice is attached for your records.
body: The April invoice is attached for your records. Please review it before forwarding to finance.

subject: Production alert recovered
snippet: The payment-api latency alert recovered after 8 minutes.
body: The payment-api latency alert recovered after 8 minutes. Please review incident notes if customer impact is suspected.
notes: Automated ops alert should be reported.

subject: Your exclusive deal notification
snippet: Deal alert: limited time offer selected for you.
body: Deal alert: limited time offer selected for you. Use coupon VIP20 before midnight. Unsubscribe from promotional notifications.
notes: Looks like notification but is actually promotion.

subject: Can you review the PR before 5 PM?
snippet: The release branch needs one more review before 5 PM.
body: Can you review the PR before 5 PM? The release branch needs one more approval before we cut the build.

subject: Weekly event roundup
snippet: Popular webinars and community events this week.
body: Here is your weekly event roundup. You subscribed to these event updates. Unsubscribe any time.

subject: Large card transaction detected
snippet: A large card transaction was detected on your account.
body: A large card transaction was detected on your account. If you do not recognize this payment, review account access and contact support.
notes: Security should win over finance for suspicious account activity.

subject: Before tomorrow: save on flights
snippet: Limited time travel sale before tomorrow.
body: Limited time travel sale before tomorrow. Save up to 40% on flights. Unsubscribe from travel deals.
notes: Contains deadline words but remains promotion.

subject: Alumni newsletter: May updates
snippet: Campus news, alumni stories, and upcoming reunions.
body: Campus news, alumni stories, and upcoming reunions. You are receiving this newsletter as an alumni subscriber.

subject: Quick question about tomorrow's workshop
snippet: Can you confirm whether you will lead the first section tomorrow?
body: Can you confirm whether you will lead the first section tomorrow? I need to update the agenda today.

subject: Benefits enrollment deadline
snippet: Please review and confirm benefits enrollment before Friday.
body: Please review and confirm your benefits enrollment before Friday. Missing the deadline may delay coverage changes.
notes: Noreply sender, but user action and deadline are important.

subject: Your receipt from App Store
snippet: Receipt for monthly subscription renewal.
body: Receipt for monthly subscription renewal. This is an automated billing receipt for your records.

subject: Weekly roundup: AI tools and libraries
snippet: A weekly roundup of AI tools, repos, and tutorials.
body: A weekly roundup of AI tools, repos, and tutorials. You subscribed to this newsletter. Unsubscribe here.
notes: Topic sounds relevant but still newsletter by default.

subject: Incident triggered: database replica lag
snippet: A high urgency incident was triggered for database replica lag.
body: A high urgency incident was triggered for database replica lag. Please review the escalation policy and acknowledge if you are on call.

subject: Please review your shopping experience
snippet: Tell us how your recent order went.
body: Please review your shopping experience and complete this customer survey. You can unsubscribe from survey invitations.
notes: Contains 'please review' but is a promotional survey.

subject: Reminder: 1:1 with manager in 10 minutes
snippet: Your 1:1 with manager starts soon.
body: Your 1:1 with manager starts in 10 minutes. Join the meeting from the calendar event.

subject: New lessons available this week
snippet: Continue learning with new course lessons.
body: New lessons are available this week. You subscribed to course updates and can unsubscribe at any time.

subject: Could you send the updated deck?
snippet: Can you send the updated deck before tomorrow's partner review?
body: Can you send the updated deck before tomorrow's partner review? The leadership team wants to review it before noon.

subject: Domain renewal invoice due tomorrow
snippet: Your domain renewal invoice is due tomorrow.
body: Your domain renewal invoice is due tomorrow. Please review billing details to prevent service interruption.

subject: People are reacting to your post
snippet: See reactions and friend suggestions.
body: People are reacting to your post. See reactions and friend suggestions. Unsubscribe from social notifications.
